chain.thought: Explanation: Among the towns with listed remaining populations, Ulysses has the highest with an estimated 5,557 as of 2008. Other towns have smaller populations (e.g., Brookville 263; White Cloud 227; Randolph 198; Neosho Falls 159; Long Island 140; Coolidge 86; Hunnewell 75; Mildred 58; Bassett 21; Freeport 7). Therefore, Ulysses has the top remaining population.

judge_thought: Explanation: The table lists several towns with remaining population estimates. Notable entries include Brookville (2008 estimated population of 263), White Cloud (227), Randolph (198), Neosho Falls (159), Long Island (140), Coolidge (86), Hunnewell (75), Mildred (58), Bassett (21), and Freeport (7). Ulysses is noted as having an estimated population of 5,557 as of 2008 at the “new” Ulysses site. This is the highest remaining population among the towns listed.
